chunks.mem:ce238028bf: Agent-A: We analyzed 3 deployment patterns. Pattern-0 has tradeoff: lower latency but higher memory footprint.
chunks.mem:3c363ae192: Pattern-1 has tradeoff: lower latency but higher memory footprint.
chunks.mem:4c6abbf3af: Pattern-2 has tradeoff: lower latency but higher memory footprint.

chunks.mem:0faa2a111c: Pattern-4 has tradeoff: lower latency but higher memory footprint.
chunks.mem:4654d3f454: Agent-B: Context from Turn-1: We approved Pattern-1, but measurements show 30% higher CPU than expected.

chunks.mem:88aeb3853d: Decision-Tree: For each combo, 2-3 deployment models
chunks.mem:4fbf8ad7b0: Precedent: Last migration chose Path-A; this decision affects new hires' learning
chunks.mem:9b4837ba18: Architect-1: If we choose multi-region DB, we need eventual-consistency semantics.
chunks.mem:2b26a6cff3: Architect-2: But if consistency is needed, single-region is only option.
chunks.mem:c4160f5df7: Arch-DB: Multi-region DB choice unlocks global-scale but requires async replication.
chunks.mem:6b082b5915: Arch-Comm: If async replication, we can't use RPC; must use event-sourcing.
chunks.mem:6e8ff4aba8: Arch-Deploy: Event-sourcing + event-driven forces serverless or event-mesh deployment.
chunks.mem:c61c1f096a: Ops: Serverless costs are predictable but cold-start adds latency.
chunks.mem:0595532b9b: Ops2: Event-mesh requires new monitoring and requires team training.
chunks.mem:35bdfe51b1: Architect-3: OK so our early DB choice cascades to 4 downstream implications.

values.task_text: Given 12 microservices with interdependencies, optimize for: minimize cost, ensure P99<200ms, maintain <50% cross-zone traffic, support 10K concurrent users, enable canary deployments, collect full distributed traces. Propose architecture.
values.summary: Architect-1: api-gateway generates 500 metrics/min, needs aggregation

values.task_text: We have two failed rollouts with similar error signatures. Differentiate root causes (infra vs code) and recommend solution.
